coins.name: BitCon
coins.description: The original crapto. Everyone's heard of it. Nobody understands it.

coins.name: Etherium
coins.description: Like BitCon but with more syllables. The smart person's crapto (they're not smart).

coins.name: Solame
coins.description: Fast, cheap, and unreliable. Like a Consett takeaway.

coins.name: Dogshit
coins.description: A meme coin that started as a joke. Still a joke. People buy it anyway.

coins.name: ExRipOff
coins.description: Banks might use it. They won't. But they might.

coins.name: Shiba Scamu
coins.description: A copy of a joke. The most honest thing in crypto.

coins.name: Cardaknow
coins.description: Academic crapto. Peer-reviewed and still worthless.

coins.name: Polkascam
coins.description: Connects all the other scams together. Blockchain of blockchains.
